MINI MINUTES: Judge: Richard Ulmer; Clerk NBautista ; Not Reported. (D218)
Appearances:
Plaintiff, John Stewart Company is present. Represented by Jason Vandara.
Attorney, John Zanghi, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Matthew Martin, is present.
Attorney, Bathaniel Bigger , representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem David Fleisig, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 304B, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
This case settled, the trial date of SEP-13-2010 is vacated.
